title: OPC UA Machinery Energy Measurement Type
description: JSON Schema for monitoring consumption Energy Management Type based on OPC UA Machinery v1.04 and Energy Management Consumption v1.0. Simplified for MQTT payload use.

applicationTag.description: Identifier for the application or context of the measurement

resource.description: defines the measured resource. This specification defines standardized values for resources (see Table 40). The numbers 0 to 128 are reserved for this specification. Vendors may use values larger 128 for their own defined resources.

accuracyClass.description: defines the accuracy, in which the energy measurement value is provided

unit.description: The unit of measurement for the energy value

localizedText.description: Text with optional locale information. Can be a simple string or an object with locale and text properties.

oneOf.description: Array of localized text values for multiple languages
